name: Tuna and Chickpea Sandwich on Rye
directions: PREPARATION.
Cook two hard boiled eggs, when done chop, set aside.
Toast slices of rye bread, set aside.
Use ½ cup of garbanzo beans and using a small motorized blender, chop coarsely, set aside.
COOKING INSTRUCTIONS.
In a sauce pan add the cooking oil and then the dried minced onions and stir-fry for about a minute, then add the tomato sauce and stir fry for two minutes, set aside.
In a big mixing bowl, add the drained tuna fish, chopped hard boiled eggs, ½ cup of chopped garbanzo beans, chopped celery, 2 tablespoons mayonnaise, Mr. Dash spice and mix well, set aside.

To create a sandwich, place 2 slides of the toasted rye bread on a plate, spread some mayonnaise on the bread, add some of the tuna & garbanzo bean mixture on top of one slice, then drizzle some of the cooked tomato sauce on top, then add some lettuce, sliced tomatoes and close the sandwich with the second piece of bread.
Next cut the sandwich in half, place a tooth pick in each half and spread apart for appearance,.
then add some of the whole garbanzo beans in front of the sandwich and sprinkle with some pepper on top, then add on the side some pickle slices as well.
Enjoy.

name: Za'atar Chicken (Middle Eastern)
directions: COMBINE oil, spice mix, seasoning.
Place chicken breasts in a ziplock and coat well.
Marinade for at least 1 hour.
Preheat over 180°C.
Remove chicken from marinade and place on a baking rack in a baking dish with chicken broth on bottom.
Bake for 40 - 45 minutes until done; golden brown.
ENJOY!

name: Easy Spicy Hummus
directions: Place everything in a food processor and add a bit of water while it's processing.  Keep adding water til it's the consistency you like.  (about 5 tablespoons).
Scrape down the sides once or twice.

similar.name: Tuna and Chickpea Sandwich on Rye

name: Grape Leaves
directions: Grape leaves:
wash and de-stem grape leaves.
add filling to dull side.
roll.
Filling:
wash rice.
remove seeds of tomatoes, dice them, and add to rice.
add one and a half of the onions, diced.
slice half an onion into rings for later.
add dill.
add ground beef.
add salt and pepper.
add lemon juice.
add half of the tomato sauce.
Cooking:
drizzle some extra virgin olive oil into casserole.
add a layer of onion rings.
add a layer of sliced green bell pepper.
add the three chicken breasts.
drizzle some tomato sauce.
add some garlic cloves with the skin still on.
add a layer of rolled grape leaves.
drizzle more tomato sauce.
add a layer of sliced green bell pepper.
add more garlic.
add salt and lemon.
repeat layers.
put a dinner plate upside down on the top of the pot.
cover with lid and cook on high until boiling.
reduce heat to medium and cook for at least an hour until rice is cooked.

name: Meat Kibbeh
directions: wash the cracked wheat and drain.

Add the smeed samolina , salt , pepper past and onion also the processed meat and knead all of it into kibbeh dough.( dip your hands in water to facilitate the kneading process and add more water if necessary .

To prepare the filling melt the butter and fry the onions until pale add the ground meat and salt and cook until the meat changes color and the water has evaporated stir in the spices and the nuts mix well . Leave aside to cool down.
Divide the kibbeh dough into small walnut size lumps.

Take each lump and make a hole in the middle dip finger in water and in large that hole with finger and fill with ground meat stuffing . Bring together the sides and shape into long sharp edge kibbes.
Arrange in tray next to each other repeat the procedure with all of the kibbe.
Heat oil in deep frying pan and fry the kibbeh few at a time until golden crispy.

name: Aash E Aaloo (Persian Soup)
directions: Soak prunes in warm water for two hours.
Peel and slice two onions and fry in oil until slightly golden.
Make ground meat into 2 cm balls and fry with onions until colour changes.
Add 3-4 glasses of water, and bring to a boil.
Finely chop herbs.
Wash rice once with warm water.
Add herbs, rice, prunes (including the water it was soaked in), salt and black pepper to meat balls.
Mix well and cook over medium heat for about 20 minutes.

name: Chicken Shawarma
directions: Chop chicken into medium sized pieces.
In a bowl, whisk together the garlic, green onion, lemon juice and olive oil.
Then add the curry powder, cumin, salt and pepper; whisk all together.
Add the chicken and coat it completely with the marinade.
If time permits, leave the chicken to marinate in the fridge for at least an hour.
Preheat pan to medium heat.
Pour chicken and all marinade into pan and grill until chicken is fully cooked through.
Serve with heated pita bread and tahini sauce.

name: Oman Potato Chip Sandwich
directions: spread cream cheese on bread
sprinkle on chili sauce
put crushed chips on some say broil it a minute
they were making it in office so maybe just roll up or microwave it a second.

similar.name: Tuna and Chickpea Sandwich on Rye

name: Lebanese Steak Sandwich
directions: Marinade beef for 5 hours or more in a ziplock bag.
Cut baguette into 4 pieces.
Put Baguettes in toaster or oven just to get a little crispy.
Sautee your beef for 2 minutes on each side.
Take baguettes out of the toaster and spread mayo on one side and sliced tomatoes.
Thinly slice your meat and place on top of tomatoes.
On the dry side of baguette spread your goats cheese.
Sprinkle some salt and pepper on the meat and there you have it!

similar.name: Tuna and Chickpea Sandwich on Rye

name: Tunisian Fricassee Sandwich
directions: pumpkin
cook pumpkin and garlic,mash together add rest of ingredients.
buns mix all ingredients  start with one cup water and add more if needed.
knead dough until it stretches between  two fingers and doesnt break form 20 balls roll out into cigar shape like 6" sub bun.
let rise
until doubled
fry in fat that comes up to middle of bun
let cool a little.
slice length  wise.
put pumpkin on one side.
eggs on other side.
fill with tuna that has potatoes with it  in the middle.
mix in lemon juice.
top with pickle and green and black olives.

similar.name: Tuna and Chickpea Sandwich on Rye

name: McDonald's Style McFalafel
directions: Prepare and fry falafel. Be sure to shape into 4 hamburger sized patties. They should be 4-5 inches across.
Once falafel is done, it is time to assemble the sandwiches.
Start with the bottom bun. Add a falafel patty.
Top the falafel patty with a tomato slice, lettuce leaf and 1/4 of the minced onions.
On the top bun, spread 2 tsp tahini sauce and top your creation. Do the same for the other three sandwiches.

similar.name: Tuna and Chickpea Sandwich on Rye

name: Almond Meal and Veggie Falafel
directions: Place the onions, garlic, cabbage, zucchini, squash, mushrooms, parsley, and cilantro in a food processor and whir until minced.
In a large, flat skillet, saute the minced vegetables until they are slightly browned, then remove from heat.

Place sauteed vegetables, hot water, and the almond meal, coconut flour, garbanzo flour, nutritional yeast, powdered peanut butter, spices/salt/pepper, and baking powder in a large bowl and combine well.  Add more coconut flour if required.
Place mixture in an airtight container and allow to cool in refrigerator for 30 minute to meld.

To cook:  take approximately a tablespoon of the mixture, and make into patties a bit less than 1/2-inch thick.  Saute both sides of patties in coconut oil on a medium heat - they brown fairly quickly, so keep watch, it only takes a couple of minutes per side.
Serve in pita, whole wheat tortillas, or low-in-carb wraps with baby spinach as greens with tahini-yogurt sauce, and enjoy!

similar.name: Tuna and Chickpea Sandwich on Rye

name: Shakshuka
directions: In a non-stick skillet heat oil over medium heat.  Add onion.  Cook and stir 4 - 6 minutes until tender.  Add next 6 ingredients and cook for an additional minute.
Add tomatoes and cook for an additional  3 - 5 minutes, until mixture is thickened, stirring occasionally.
With the back of a spoon, make four wells in the tomato mixture.  Top each well with cilantro, if desired, then break an egg into each well.
Cook for 4 to 7 minutes until eggs are cooked to desired doneness.
